calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public Corporation.
Tracy McCormack, attorney from the plaintiff's Office of General Counsel, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Gary David Lampert, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on July 11, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 16, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public Corporation, and against the Defaulted defendant Gary David Lampert, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $98,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $13,049.10, for a total judgment in the amount of $111,049.10.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
